news_context_text:
【Apple AAPL Latest Intel】
1. Apple Intelligence features driving iPhone 16 upgrade cycle; management guides for accelerating revenue in Q2 FY2025.
2. Services segment grew 14% YoY in Q1 FY2025, reaching $26.3B; gross margin 75.1%.
3. Vision Pro sales below initial targets but developer ecosystem expanding; no major design refresh expected until 2026.
4. Risks: China revenue decline (-11% YoY in Q1); antitrust investigations in EU and US; AI feature differentiation still unclear.

latest_news.summary: iPhone 16 upgrade cycle underway; Services margins expand; Vision Pro disappoints

risk_check.summary: China market headwinds; EU/US antitrust; AI feature clarity needed

earnings_preview.summary: Q2 FY2025 guidance in-line; buyback program $110B approved; dividend raised
